message:
feat(tui): add user preferences model for dashboard (bd-xzt.2.10)

Implements UserPreferences with atomic persistence, debounced writes,
session override merging, and environment-aware resolution. Enums map
to theme/model types. 35 tests cover roundtrip, validation, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
